title: palicourea tenerior
intro: Palicourea tenerior, also known as the white angel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea tenerior include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional herbal preparations such as tinctures or decoctions.
